response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software development experience and some informal leadership through workshops, founding GISCollective, and organizing dojos at National Instruments. However, the resume shows no formal people management or team leadership experience (2 years required), no dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure role (3 years required), and no mobile-platform ecosystem focus. Strong individual contributor profile, but does not meet the core management and developer-productivity requirements for this role.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot full-stack and systems engineering experience
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring via workshops, courses, and refactoring dojos
Strong testing/TDD culture and tooling contributions (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner)
concerns: No formal people management or direct-report leadership experience documented
Lacks dedicated 3+ years building developer tools, compilers, or build/test infrastructure
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (brief iOS/Apple TV work is dated and limited)
